description_long: This object is a stylized flower with deep burgundy petals arranged in a dense, layered formation, giving it a lush and full appearance. The petals are elongated, slightly curved, and overlap each other, creating a sense of depth and natural complexity. The flower is supported by a slender, green stem that curves gently, adding a sense of organic movement. A single, broad, lanceolate green leaf emerges from the lower part of the stem, featuring visible vein-like textures. The overall form is delicate and expressive, with a painterly, semi-transparent quality to the petals and leaf. This flower would be a striking visual element in an urban park, garden, or streetscape.
description: A stylized burgundy flower with layered petals, a curved green stem, and a single broad green leaf. The petals are dense and overlapping, giving a lush, expressive look.
description_view_0: The flower is seen from the front, showing the full spread of burgundy petals and the broad green leaf extending to the left.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the depth and layering of the petals, with the stem and leaf appearing more foreshortened and the leaf pointing downward.
description_view_2: The flower is viewed from the opposite side, with the petals' overlapping structure visible and the leaf extending to the right.
description_view_3: This rear angle emphasizes the back of the petals and the curvature of the stem, with the leaf partially obscured and angled downward.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a dense, radial configuration with significant overlapping and layering, forming a whorled pattern around the center. The arrangement is symmetrical and gives the flower a full, rounded appearance.
